tagline: Building cinematic digital experiences with modern web technologies & AI.
description: Building cinematic digital experiences, scalable systems, and AI-powered products with modern web technologies.

roles.short: full-stack developer · ai builder · Tester · problem solver
roles.detailed: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications using the MERN stack, AWS cloud services, and modern DevOps practices. Specialized in backend development, RESTful APIs, cloud deployments, CI/CD automation, and software testing, with a strong focus on performance, reliability, and delivering production-ready solutions.

bio: I'm a Full Stack & AI Developer with 2+ years of experience developing modern web applications and cloud solutions. I work across the entire development lifecycle—from frontend interfaces and backend architectures to cloud deployment, testing, and automation. Leveraging AI tools such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, and Claude, I focus on building innovative, scalable, and efficient solutions that solve real-world problems.

bullets: Developed and maintained scalable full-stack web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB for business-critical solutions.
Designed and integrated RESTful APIs, authentication systems, cloud storage solutions, and third-party services including AWS S3, Razorpay, MSG91, and email platforms.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, containerized applications with Docker, and managed deployments on Render, Hostinger, Vercel, and MongoDB Atlas.
Performed unit testing with Jest, end-to-end testing with Playwright, API testing using Postman, and load testing using JMeter to ensure application quality and reliability.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams using GitHub and Jira while leveraging AI tools such as ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, and Claude to accelerate development and improve productivity.
experience.desc: Full Stack Developer specializing in MERN stack development, cloud-based applications, backend architecture, API development, testing automation, and deployment workflows. Experienced in building scalable production-ready applications with modern cloud and DevOps practices.

projects.title: ArchiReach
projects.subtitle: Architecture & Project Management Platform
projects.desc: Developed a full-stack Architecture & Project Management Platform connecting architects, clients, firms, and students. Implemented JWT and Google OAuth authentication, real-time messaging with Socket.io, AWS S3 file storage, Razorpay payment integration, Resend email notifications, role-based access control, project workflows, subscriptions, referrals, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.

projects.title: RMJ Jewels
projects.subtitle: Jewelry E-Commerce & CRM Management Platform
projects.desc: Developed a full-stack jewelry e-commerce platform with product catalog management, shopping cart, secure authentication, order tracking, and Razorpay payment integration. Built a comprehensive CRM-style admin dashboard to manage products, inventory, orders, customers, inquiries, pricing, analytics, and business operations. Integrated AWS S3 and Cloudinary for scalable cloud-based media storage and optimized platform performance for seamless user experience.

projects.title: Siddha Medical Science
projects.subtitle: Traditional Medicine Information Platform
projects.desc: Developed a responsive Siddha medicine information platform using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to present structured traditional medical content. Implemented mobile-friendly UI/UX, optimized website performance, and integrated client-side security measures to discourage screenshots, screen recording, content copying, and unauthorized content access on supported devices.

projects.title: LocalAce
projects.subtitle: Home Cleaning Service Platform
projects.desc: Developed a responsive home cleaning service platform using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, enabling customers to explore services, pricing, and booking options through an intuitive user interface. Implemented SEO best practices, mobile-friendly design, performance optimization, and user-focused navigation to improve visibility, engagement, and customer experience.

expertise.title: Full Stack Development
expertise.desc: Experienced in building scalable web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, authentication systems, and modern frontend architectures.

expertise.title: Cloud & DevOps
expertise.desc: Hands-on experience with AWS services including S3, IAM, Route 53, and CloudFront. Skilled in Docker containerization, GitHub Actions CI/CD automation, and cloud deployments using Render, Hostinger, Vercel, Netlify, and MongoDB Atlas.

expertise.title: Software Testing & Quality Assurance
expertise.desc: Experienced in Jest for unit testing, Playwright for end-to-end testing, Postman for API testing, and JMeter for load and performance testing to ensure application reliability and quality.

expertise.title: Third-Party Integrations & Cloud Services
expertise.desc: Integrated services including Razorpay payment gateway, MSG91 OTP verification, Resend email platform, AWS S3 storage, Google OAuth authentication, and cloud-based business solutions.
